theme_and_archetype.rationale: For an admin dashboard handling large data sets (Firebase collections), clarity and authority are paramount. This archetype uses strict grids, stark contrasts, and prioritizes data legibility over decorative flair.
theme_and_archetype.emotional_tone: Objective, rigid, functional, professional, and efficient.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for all headers > 24px.

body.usage: Clean, highly legible monospace-adjacent font for data tables and dense UI elements.

mono.usage: Use for IDs, Firebase document references, code snippets, or raw JSON views.

rules.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px solid borders (#E4E4E7) to define structure, not soft shadows. 'Grid Borders' approach preferred.
rules.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Always define hover states (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-zinc-900).

spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8). Use tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for widget density.

layout_structure.sidebar: w-64 fixed h-screen border-r border-zinc-200 bg-zinc-50 flex flex-col
layout_structure.header: h-16 border-b border-zinc-200 px-8 flex items-center justify-between sticky top-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md z-40

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002277] rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-50 rounded-none px-6 py-2 transition-colors

tables.usage: Use Shadcn Table. Implement sortable column headers and sticky headers if data is long. Row hover states must be distinct (hover:bg-zinc-50). Add a checkbox column for bulk actions.
tables.actions: Place an 'Actions' dropdown (Shadcn Dropdown Menu) at the end of each row for Edit/Delete.

forms_and_inputs.inputs: Shadcn Input. Rounded-none, border-zinc-300 focus:border-[#002FA7] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#002FA7].
forms_and_inputs.dialogs: Use Shadcn Sheet (Slide-over from right) for creating/editing documents to keep the table in context, or Dialog for simple confirmations.
forms_and_inputs.bulk_upload: A dedicated drag-and-drop zone with border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-300 bg-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors py-12 text-center.

notifications.usage: Use Sonner for real-time Firebase sync notifications. Position bottom-right.

icons.library: lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react for sharper, high-end data icons.

interaction_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must have a visible hover state altering background color or border. No floating or scaling (translate/scale) in this rigid dashboard.
interaction_and_motion.loading: Use skeleton loaders (Shadcn Skeleton) mimicking the table structure instead of generic spinners.

admin_user.description: Professional minimalist portrait for the admin user profile in the header menu.

auth_page.description: Subtle abstract wavy light background, to be used if a login/auth page is built before accessing the dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use the Shadcn UI components available in /app/frontend/src/components/ui.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Override default rounded corners of Shadcn to rounded-none or rounded-sm to maintain the 'Swiss Brutalist' rigid aesthetic.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Implement a sidebar layout for the Collection Switcher (ArtistCollections, ArtistDetails, CategoryDetails, CategorySubDetails, Languages, SongDetails).
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Integrate Firebase Firestore logic directly with the table. Ensure real-time listeners update the table state automatically.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: For 'Manual Form Entry', build a dynamic form that adjusts based on the selected collection's schema. Open this form inside a Shadcn Sheet or Dialog.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: For 'Bulk Upload', implement a CSV/JSON file parser (like PapaParse) and batch write to Firestore.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Ensure all interactive elements (Buttons, Table Rows, Nav Links) include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-artist-details').
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Do NOT use generic 'Inter' font. Apply IBM Plex Sans globally for the body and Chivo for headers via Google Fonts.
